data.reasoningText:
The user is asking for guidance on how to save and restore draft text in a .NET MAUI app when the app goes to the background and comes back to the foreground. This is about app lifecycle management in .NET MAUI.

I'll provide a concise, practical example showing how to use the MAUI app lifecycle events (OnSleep/OnResume or the newer lifecycle events) combined with Preferences or a similar mechanism to persist draft text.
